elasticloadbalancingv2.listenerrule.host: Information about a host header condition.

elasticloadbalancingv2.listenerrule.host.Description: One or more host names. The maximum size of each name is 128 characters. The comparison is case insensitive. The following wildcard characters are supported: * (matches 0 or more characters) and ? (matches exactly 1 character).  If you specify multiple strings, the condition is satisfied if one of the strings matches the host name.
